title: Rescinds the Class I and II pots (office of the Commissioner for Linguistic Minorities )

[F. No. 3-13/2014-CLM] RAKESH MOHAN, Jt. Secy. Note:- The principal rules were published in the Gazette of India in 1962 and subsequently amended vide notification number G.S.R.2329 dated 6th September, 1975. 1583 GII2016 Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi- I 10064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-I 10054. -- 1 of 1 --
